validation_results.code_quality: High. The implementation is clean, uses appropriate data structures (sets) for delta computation, and includes comprehensive unit tests.
edge_cases_covered: Partial overlap between baseline and current state

criteria_verification.notes: Baseline state is captured in AgentInvoker.invoke_player() before the player is invoked.
_compute_file_delta subtracts the baseline set from the current set, ensuring only per-task changes are counted.
_create_player_report_from_task_work now calls _compute_file_delta instead of using a raw union of git changes.
Verified by test_first_task_no_baseline_reports_all_files; if baseline is None, the full current state is returned.
16 unit tests in tests/unit/test_git_delta_detection.py verify the delta logic and integration.
Logger.info added in _create_player_report_from_task_work to report baseline and delta counts.

rationale: The Player has fully implemented the requirements, providing a robust delta-based git detection mechanism and verifying it with a comprehensive test suite. All acceptance criteria are met.
